case_title: LOUIE, NELSON et al vs. GODWIN, JOSHUA M. et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOUIE, NELSON LOUIE, CAROL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GODWIN, JOSHUA M. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 121 CORTLAND AVE [MAIN FLOOR, SECOND DOOR ON LEFT], LEASE FORFEITED, CLERK'S NOTATION RENDERED ON ORIGINAL LEASE PER CRC 522 JUDGMENT INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES PER CCP 415.46.
